fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the dimension.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the dimension.

fields.name: Selected
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this dimension will be included.

fields.name: New Dimension Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new dimension value to that you are changing to.

fields.name: Dimension Value Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value that the analysis view is based on.

fields.name: Level
fields.tooltip: Specifies the level for the selected dimension.
